edits.contents: [{"type":"text","text":"Mature-repo promotion threshold smoke. 5 regression-promotion commits + 20 per-issue scenario additions → ratio 0.25 → N = 5. Borderline scenario scores 4 → NOT tagged.\n"}]

@adw-512 @adw-threshold-smoke
Feature: Borderline threshold scenario — mature repo

  @adw-512
  Scenario: A borderline scenario scoring below the raised threshold
    Given the mock GitHub API is configured to accept issue comments
    When the "promotion-sweep" orchestrator is invoked with adwId "promotion-threshold-smoke-512" and issue 512
    Then the orchestrator subprocess exited 0
    And the mock harness recorded zero PR-merge calls
